indications.text:
Amturnide is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the
risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been
seen in controlled trials of antihypertensive drugs from a w...
